name: [YAOC2] Onboarding — Telegram
_doc: Handles first-contact Telegram users who are not yet in yaoc2.user_profiles. Triggered by the Telegram ingress when the Onboarding Router returns {action:'onboard'}. Sends a welcome message, asks for role and tenant confirmation, writes the user profile to Postgres, assigns the default policy set, and then routes the original message to the brain.

parameters.text:
={{ '👋 Welcome to *YAOC2 — Threat Intel Assistant*

I don't have you in my records yet. Let me get you set up.

Your profile:
• *Handle:* ' + $json.display_name + '
• *Channel:* Telegram
• *Default role:* analyst
• *Default tenant:* default

If these look correct, reply *confirm* to finish onboarding.
Or reply *role:<your role>* or *tenant:<your org>* to customise.

Once confirmed, your original message will be processed normally.' }}

={{ '✅ *Onboarding complete.*

You are now registered as:
• *Role:* ' + $('Resolve Role & Tenant').first().json.role + '
• *Tenant:* ' + $('Resolve Role & Tenant').first().json.tenant + '
• *Policy set:* default

You can now send threat intel queries, IOC lookups, or request case creation. Type *help* for a list of capabilities.' }}
